The Dreams of Pharaoh

Joseph Interprets Pharaoh’s Dreams

NoteSee LXX; MT a fifth from the land

Joseph Given Charge of Egypt

NoteOr the spirit of the gods
NoteThat is, “Abrek,” probably an Egyptian word that sounds similar to the Hebrew for kneel
NoteZaphenath-paneah probably means Revealer of Mysteries or God speaks and lives. NoteThat is, Heliopolis, as in LXX; also in verse 50

The Seven Years of Plenty

NoteManasseh sounds like the Hebrew for making to forget.
NoteEphraim sounds like the Hebrew for making fruitful or twice fruitful.
